code:
mut i = 1
mut c3 = 1
mut c5 = 1
while i <= 15
  if c3 == 3 and c5 == 5
    println("FizzBuzz")
    c3 = 1
    c5 = 1
  else if c3 == 3
    println("Fizz")
    c3 = 1
    c5 = c5 + 1
  else if c5 == 5
    println("Buzz")
    c5 = 1
    c3 = c3 + 1
  else
    println("#{i}")
    c3 = c3 + 1
    c5 = c5 + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
